settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage installation, retention, and delivery settings for your workspace.
settings.workspace.description: Keep your workspace details and setup aligned with the way customers will experience DXM Pulse.
settings.telegram.description: Receive instant alerts via Telegram — the fastest way to stay informed on mobile.
settings.telegram.help: Get a token from @BotFather. Leave it blank if you only want to keep your current token.
settings.telegram.chatHelp: Use @userinfobot or your channel ID. Enter both fields to replace Telegram credentials.
settings.telegram.missingChatId: Enter a chat ID before saving Telegram settings.
settings.telegram.missingBotToken: Enter the bot token to save Telegram settings for the first time.
settings.opsDesc: The essentials you need to keep DXM Pulse useful every week.
settings.sites.description: Copy the live install snippet, verify tracking, and check which sites are already sending data.
settings.sites.emptyDesc: Create your first site in onboarding to generate a live SDK snippet and start collecting sessions.
settings.sites.installDesc: Paste this before the closing </body> tag on your site.
settings.digest.title: Weekly Digest
settings.digest.description: Push a plain-language summary to Telegram so the product keeps delivering value between dashboard visits.
settings.digest.enableHelp: Recommended for founders and operators who prefer updates pushed to them.
settings.digest.note: Weekly digest is delivered only when Telegram is configured for the workspace.
settings.copyError: Could not copy to clipboard. Try again.

demo.banner: Demo mode — showing sample Ethiopian e-commerce data
health.healthyDesc: Everything is running smoothly. No critical issues found.
health.issuesDesc: We found some problems that might affect your users.
health.criticalDesc: There are critical issues that need your immediate attention.
problems.noneDesc: No problems detected — your site is running smoothly.
problems.title: {{count}} problems detected
empty.noMetricsDesc: Add the tracking snippet to your site to start seeing metrics.
empty.noSessionsDesc: Sessions will appear here when visitors browse your tracked site.
landing.heroSubtitle: Know exactly what's happening on your website. Session recordings, smart alerts, and performance insights — built for Ethiopian businesses.
landing.problemTitle: Your website has problems you can't see
landing.problem1Desc: Broken buttons, confusing navigation, and errors your users never report.
landing.problem2Desc: Visitors leave your site without buying, signing up, or contacting you.
landing.problem3Desc: Pages that take too long to load on Ethiopian mobile networks.
landing.featureTitle: Everything you need to understand your users
landing.feature1Desc: Watch exactly what your users do — every click, scroll, and page visit.
landing.feature2Desc: Get notified on Telegram when users struggle or your site slows down.
landing.feature3Desc: Track Core Web Vitals and page load speed across all devices.
landing.step1Desc: One line of code. Works with any website.
landing.step2Desc: Real-time sessions, heatmaps, and performance metrics.
landing.step3Desc: We catch issues automatically so you can fix them fast.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free, prove value quickly, and upgrade in ETB when the product starts paying for itself.
landing.trust1Desc: Full Amharic interface — no translation needed.
landing.trust2Desc: Lightweight SDK designed for Ethiopian mobile networks.
landing.trust3Desc: Data stored securely. No sharing with third parties.
landing.footerTagline: See what your customers experience before they disappear.
landing.footerMadeInBlurb: Built in Ethiopia for teams that need clear, mobile-friendly website insight without enterprise pricing.
audit.title: How fast is your website?
audit.subtitle: Run a quick public check before you install the full tracking snippet.
audit.error: Could not reach this website. Check the URL and try again.
